headline: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Q2 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
summary: Healthcare products company West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) will be announcing earnings results tomorrow before market open. Here’s what to expect.

headline: Cardinal Health Expands Home Care Business With Two Acquisitions
summary: CAH is set to buy two home-care businesses for about $360 million, expanding diabetes and urology reach while targeting first-year EPS accretion.

headline: Revvity to Launch Signals for Startups for Emerging Biotech Companies
summary: RVTY's Signals for Startups gives early-stage biotechs scalable software and guided onboarding to streamline research and support future growth.

headline: West (WST) Stock Looks Pricey With Little Room Above Fair Value
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services stock has delivered a 64.7% return over the past year, yet the valuation checks and current pricing suggest it may no longer be an obvious bargain, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) estimate pointing to a level that is roughly in line with where the shares trade today. After such a strong run, investors are weighing solid business developments against signals that the stock screens as expensive on several measures. Over the past 1 year, West Pharmaceutical...
